c.d: The total number of movies and TV shows available on the platform.
The number of exclusive movies and series produced by the platform.
The monthly fee required to access the platform's content.
Availability of a free tier with advertisements.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, smart TVs, streaming devices) supported by the app.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience of the app.
The maximum video resolution and audio quality offered by the platform.
The countries or regions where the app is accessible.
The diversity of movie genres available on the platform.
Availability of downloading content for offline viewing.
